` with `text-sm font-medium` | | `StepperDescription` | `stepper-description` | `

` with `text-sm text-muted-foreground` | | `StepperSeparator` | `stepper-separator` | `h-0.5 flex-1` horizontal / `ml-4 h-6 w-0.5` vertical; turns `bg-primary` when `step < activeStep` | | `StepperContent` | `stepper-content` | Returns `null` unless `step === activeStep` | ### 2. `examples/stepper-demo.tsx` — Interactive 3-step demo Shows Account → Profile → Complete with `StepperTrigger`, `StepperTitle`, `StepperSeparator` per step, `StepperContent` panels that swap on navigation, and Previous/Next buttons using `React.useState`. The `Stepper` root is overridden to `flex-col` via `className` (tailwind-merge resolves the conflict) so content panels stack below the indicator row while `orientation="horizontal"` still flows to child separators through context. ### 3. `ui/_registry.ts` — Added `"stepper"` entry (no external dependencies) ### 4. `examples/_registry.ts` — Added `"stepper-demo"` entry with `registryDependencies: ["stepper"]`
